items.name: SJWP_Research
items.description: Vibro-acoustic simulation and machine learning framework for non-invasive water leak detection in urban plumbing systems. Developed for SJWP India.

items.name: ModelComparer
items.description: A machine learning experimentation framework that allows users to train, compare, and ensemble multiple classification and regression models on CSV datasets

items.name: MultiScaleArrays.jl
items.description: A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations

items.name: pamiq-core
items.description: Framework for building AI agents with real-time adaptive learning capabilities.

items.name: APLR-interpretable-ML
items.description: A reusable APLR-powered interpretable machine learning framework for binary classification with built-in explainability

items.name: ASLVizNet-Sign_Language_Recognition_Using_Convolutional_Neural_Networks_in_Machine_Learning
items.description: Research-grade ASL recognition framework using CNN, SSD MobileNet v2, and TensorFlow Object Detection API for real-time gesture detection.

items.name: UIRS
items.description: Unified digital framework aimed at transforming citizen-generated data into actionable municipal intelligence. The system integrates machine learning techniques for automated issue classification, trend prediction, and anomaly detection, enabling authorities to proactively identify recurring urban issues before they escalate.

items.name: LNG-Regasification-Plant-Optimization
items.description: This master's thesis presents a comprehensive machine learning framework for optimizing LNG regasification process plant in Nigeria.

items.name: ai_fraud_detection
items.description: A fraud detection framework using Generative AI (GenAI) and unsupervised machine learning to identify suspicious patterns in financial transactions.

items.name: folax
items.description: Folax (Finite Operator Learning with JAX) is a framework for solving and optimizing PDEs by integrating machine learning with numerical methods in computational mechanics.

items.name: anvil
items.description: Anvil is a high-performance machine learning framework written in Rust, designed from the ground up for speed, parallelism, and control.

items.name: A-Decentralized-Framework-for-AI-based-Resource-Allocation-in-Open-RAN
items.description: A decentralized framework for AI-based resource allocation in Open RAN optimizes network efficiency. It uses machine learning models, deployed at the network edge, to autonomously manage resources like spectrum and power, enhancing performance and scalability without a central controller.

items.name: AI4SG_UseCaseAssessment
items.description: Interactive assessment framework for scoping AI, machine learning and data science projects for social good organizations.

items.name: BioGraphX
items.description: BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

items.name: spacecraft-propulsion-phm
items.description: A Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) framework for spacecraft propulsion systems using high-frequency sensor data and machine learning for multi-class fault diagnosis.

items.name: mlops-automation-framework
items.description: A general-purpose, domain-agnostic MLOps framework that automates the complete machine learning lifecycle from data versioning to model deployment and monitoring. Built with open-source tools to avoid vendor lock-in and enable reproducible ML workflows.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Service-for-Farm-Pro
items.description: This is a machine learning service for the Farm Pro system based on fastapi framework.

items.name: sentinelcam
items.description: A computer vision and machine learning pipeline on a distributed framework. Designed for an embedded network on low voltage IoT hardware.

items.name: STRADA-traffic-risk-analysis-project
items.description: Machine learning framework for traffic risk prediction and reliability-aware safety interpretation using large-scale accident data.

items.name: Hybrid-Texture-Frequency-Based-Brain-MRI-Abnormality-Detection-Using-Random-Forest
items.description: This project presents a hybrid machine learning framework that combines texture features (GLCM, LBP), frequency-domain features (FFT), and structural edge information to capture both local and global patterns within MRI images, that distinguish normal and abnormal brain tissues.

items.name: breast-cancer-multiomics-ai
items.description: a comprehensive multi-project framework integrating AI, machine learning, and multi-omics approaches for breakthrough breast cancer research

items.name: MLopoly-Gamified-Machine-Learning-Education
items.description: A research-driven serious game framework for experiential learning of machine learning concepts.

items.name: Urban-Smart-Grid-Predictive-Analytics-Anomaly-Detection
items.description: A Hybrid Deep Learning and Unsupervised Machine Learning Framework for Smart Energy Grid Monitoring.

items.name: VMDragonSlayer
items.description: Automated multi-engine framework for unpacking, analyzing, and devirtualizing binaries protected by commercial and custom Virtual Machine based protectors. Combines Dynamic Taint Tracking, Symbolic Execution, Pattern & Semantic Classification, and Machine Learning–driven prioritization to dramatically reduce manual reverse engineering time.

items.name: autonomous-cross-domain-self-healing-network--acdshnet-
items.description: A framework enabling subsystems to autonomously identify and self-heal integration points across domains using machine learning and real-time feedback loops.

items.name: flaky-test-prediction-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for detecting flaky tests and improving CI/CD pipeline reliability.

items.name: NEURON657
items.description: NEURON657 by Walter Diego Spaltro. It's a "Formal Cognitive State Framework with Integrated Learning" sophisticated state machine/cognitive architecture. This could power intelligent agents and autonomous systems, pattern recognition, robotics decision engines, anomaly detection, AI research platforms, game AI, and adaptive recommendation systems.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Model-Monitoring-Platform
items.description: A Machine Learning Monitoring Framework designed to provide real-time observability across ML Quality, Data Drift, Operational Performance, and Infrastructure Health.

items.name: CapstoneProject
items.description: Capstone project for the Imperial College London AI & Machine Learning Certificate, showcasing end-to-end ML development — from data preparation to model training, evaluation, and insights using Python and modern ML frameworks.

items.name: Harmful-Algal-Bloom-Prediction-in-Niger-Delta-Coastal-Waters-Using-Remote-Sensing-and-ML
items.description: Machine learning–driven prediction of harmful algal blooms in Niger Delta coastal waters using synthetic remote sensing and water quality data, demonstrating an early warning framework for coastal ecosystem monitoring, environmental risk assessment, and decision support in data-scarce regions.

items.name: machine-learning
items.description: In this repository different AI/ML algorithms are implemented by using PyTorch framework for learning purpose.

items.name: Research--An-XAI-intergrated-Machine-Learning-Framework-
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Class Cyber Threat Detection: A Comparative Analysis of Random Forest and SVM with SHAP

items.name: Research-on-An-Explainable-Machine-Learning-Framework-
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Class Cyber Threat Detection: A Comparative Analysis of Random Forest and SVM with SHAP

items.name: ML_From_Scratch
items.description: A compact machine learning framework implemented from scratch using NumPy.

items.name: hridya-heart-risk-prediction-by-using-qml-
items.description: HRIDYA (Heart Risk Intelligence Driven Yielding Assessment) is a research-oriented hybrid machine learning framework designed to study cardiovascular risk prediction using both classical machine learning models and quantum-inspired learning techniques.

items.name: OMLO
items.description: Oblivious ML-Ops (OMLO), a framework for privacy-preserving machine learning infrastructure that enables training and serving of ML models while hiding data-dependent access patterns.

items.name: ML-QSPR-Weighted-Sombor
items.description: A comparative machine learning framework for predicting physicochemical properties using 28 novel Weighted Sombor Indices.

items.name: Predictive-Analytics-for-Cost-Efficient-Marketing-Campaign-Strategy
items.description: This project develops a predictive targeting framework to optimize marketing spend. By ranking customers by response probability, it captures ~83% of responders while targeting only the top 30%, increasing response rate from 15% to ~42%. It shows how machine learning drives cost-efficient, data-driven marketing decisions.

items.name: bitcoin-investment-strategy-analysis
items.description: A Python-based backtesting framework comparing HODL, DCA, and a 10-factor quantitative strategy on 14 years of Bitcoin data, demonstrating the risks of overfitting in financial machine learning.

items.name: MICRO-AI
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for high-resolution DNA microarray data  analysis and automated disease detection.

items.name: QA-PILM-inverse-consolidation-analysis
items.description: This is a repository for Quasi-Analytic Physics-Informed Machine Learning program for solving inverse problems of consolidation (i.e., diffusion PDE). The framework is designed to address field heterogeneity and measurement sparsity, which are major concerns for site characterization tasks in geotechnical engineering.

items.name: Spoilage-Prediction-Framework-IoT-RandomForest
items.description: A novel IoT-based predictive framework for food spoilage detection integrating multi-sensor hardware prototyping (temperature, humidity, gas sensors) with Random Forest machine learning analysis. The system enables real-time environmental monitoring and early spoilage prediction to reduce supply chain losses and improve food safety.

items.name: chesapeake-Bay-groundwater-ML-Model
items.description: A machine learning framework for forecasting groundwater level fluctuations in the Eastern Shore of Chesapeake Bay. Features multi-variate time-series analysis of hydrometeorological drivers for the Eastern University MSc Data Science Capstone

items.name: Open-Agent-Eval-Lab
items.description: Open Agent Eval Lab is an open-source machine learning evaluation framework for benchmarking tool-using LLM agents. It provides split-aware task datasets, deterministic graders, reproducible run artifacts, and an auto-generated leaderboard so developers can compare model-driven agent behavior consistently and share results transparently.

items.name: brain4j
items.description: Open-source machine learning framework for Java. Designed with speed and lightweight in mind.

items.name: periop-prediction-framework
items.description: Machine learning models for predicting postoperative delirium from perioperative EHR data, including baseline models, domain-structured ensembles, interpretability, calibration, and decision curve analysis.

items.name: Sleepstill
items.description: A Hybrid machine-learning and process-based regional crop modelling framework to improve rice production strategies under data constraints

items.name: rf-arima-sustainability-india
items.description: Synthetic dataset and code for: A Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for AI-Driven Sustainable Development (MDPI Technical Note)

items.name: insider-threat-dashboard
items.description: This project provides a robust, machine learning-driven framework for identifying potential insider threats within an organization's digital ecosystem. The system analyzes user behavior, network activity, and data access patterns to proactively flag suspicious activities.AI Explainable Alerts and Role-Based Explanations

items.name: Battery-Pipeline
items.description: A modular machine learning framework for battery dataset classification and RUL prediction.

items.name: Airline-Passenger-Satisfaction-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: The project analyses the Satisfaction of airline passengers, by analysing a dataset of 10,000 passengers. The SEMMA framework was utilised in the process of SAS data mining, with Regression and Decision tree models utilised.

items.name: TensorShadow
items.description: TensorShadow is a modular AI framework that combines TensorFlow, R analytics, and Go microservices to build scalable, production-ready machine learning systems.

items.name: neural-Network-from-scratch-in-CPP
items.description: This project implements a basic feed-forward neural network from scratch in C++, built directly from mathematical definitions without using any machine learning libraries or frameworks.

items.name: City-Wise-Crime-Analysis-and-Prediction
items.description: A Machine Learning Based Framework for City-Wise Crime Analysis and Forecasting using monthly aggregated time-series data.

items.name: TAV-v3.0-Transparent-AI-Validator
items.description: TERV is an advanced Machine Learning validation and comparison framework designed to build, evaluate, and explain multiple classification models in a transparent and interpretable way.  It integrates traditional ML algorithms such as:  Linear Models  Logistic Regression  K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)  Naive Bayes  Decision Tree  Random Forest

items.name: machine-learning-particulate-matter-toxicity-prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting toxicity thresholds of particulate matter to enhance air quality risk assessment.

items.name: MachineLearning-DataScience-Study
items.description: Study of Machine Learning and Data Science using Python and Frameworks - Theory and Projects

items.name: tbg-stm-ftldos-hubbard-U-regression
items.description: Machine learning framework for inferring interaction-dependent features from simulated STM-derived Fourier-transformed local density of states (FT-LDOS) images in TBG moiré systems.

items.name: fedlearner
items.description: A multi-party collaborative machine learning framework

items.name: LLM-Safety-Verification
items.description: A robust framework for formal verification of multi-agent systems powered by LLMs, ensuring safe and reliable decision-making. Integrates machine learning with formal methods to validate agent behaviors, safety constraints, and real-world simulations in critical domains like autonomous driving and robotics.

items.name: MIND-Crypt
items.description: A Machine Learning-Based Framework for Assessing Cryptographic Indistinguishability of Lightweight Block Ciphers

items.name: BioengineeringAgricultureRobots
items.description: Reinforcement learning framework for agricultural robots using n step and Double DQN policy learning to optimize spraying, planting, and harvesting decisions. Designed for integration with real machine vision pipelines to enable perception driven, resource efficient autonomous farm labor.

items.name: Multimodal-Machine-Learning-and-Data-Analysis-Framework-for-Depression-Detection
items.description: Master's thesis codebase for evaluation of fusion strategies in clinical depression screening. Multimodal depression detection framework using Text, Audio, and Video modalities with Early and Late Fusion strategies. Implements Logistic Regression and XGBoost classifiers on E-DAIC dataset with SHAP and coefficient-based methods.

items.name: GSM-Prediction-with-XAI
items.description: Physics-guided machine learning framework for accurate GSM prediction in Single Jersey knit fabric with SHAP-based explainability.

items.name: Space-Telemetry-for-LEO-Satellites
items.description: This project presents a physics-inspired spacecraft telemetry simulation and anomaly detection framework that models power, thermal, and communication subsystems in Low Earth Orbit. It combines engineering-based thresholds and machine learning to analyze synthetic telemetry and study fault detection and spacecraft health monitoring.

items.name: Breast_cancer_analysis
items.description: A clinical-grade machine learning pipeline for breast cancer diagnosis, paired with an interpretable feature framework to support medical decision-making.

items.name: Adaptive-Hybrid-Obfuscation-for-Privacy
items.description: A multi-level obfuscation framework (mild, moderate, strong) for privacy-preserving machine learning on network-traffic data. Includes dataset balancing, obfuscation scripts, TabNet models, baseline ML benchmarks, and reproducible experiments.

items.name: mlinternship
items.description: End-to-end ML pipeline for analyzing and mitigating bias in machine learning models. Features bias detection (SPD, EOD, DIR metrics), multiple classifiers (Random Forest, Logistic Regression, SVM), and a configurable YAML-driven training framework.

items.name: Sustainable-approach-of-reduced-waste-using-Optimised-ml-Algorithm-for-predicting-crop-yields
items.description: This project presents a complete machine-learning framework designed to improve sustainable agriculture. It addresses the modern struggle with unpredictable crop yields, improper fertilizer application, and rising agricultural waste through an integrated approach combining Predictive Analytics and Computer Vision.

items.name: Doxorubicin-Nanocarrier-Toxicity-in-Normal-Cells
items.description: A Physics-Informed Machine Learning Framework for Predicting and Mitigating Doxorubicin Nanocarrier Toxicity in Normal Cells

items.name: industrial-learning-agent
items.description: Development of a multi-agent system architecture designed to build machine learning pipelines using automatic machine learning frameworks

items.name: behavioral-biometrics-fraud-detection-ml
items.description: A Multi-Layered Security Framework for Digital Payments: Behavioral Biometrics-Based Fraud Detection Using Machine Learning.”  The objective of the research is to enhance digital payment security by combining behavioral biometrics with machine learning - based fraud detection.

items.name: Financial-State-Tracker
items.description: A project builds a financial state tracking framework for listed companies using financial ratios and unsupervised machine learning techniques. The project focuses on clustering firms by financial characteristics, analyzing state migration over time, and supporting firm screening for research and portfolio management reference.

items.name: ryzen-ai-documentation
items.description: Onboarding documentation source for the AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform.   The AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform enables developers to take pretrained machine learning models in popular frameworks and run them on laptops powered by AMD Ryzen™ AI technology.

items.name: Prism
items.description: An advanced threat detection framework that integrates signature-based matching with machine learning anomaly detection to identify zero-day vulnerabilities. It features a distributed ML pipeline utilizing secure aggregation for privacy-preserving intelligence sharing and custom-built parsers to normalize logs

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: a simple machine learning framework build from scratch

items.name: mausam48.github.io
items.description: 🤖 Empower machines to reason about affordances in new environments with A4-Agent's advanced zero-shot learning framework.

items.name: Neural-AdS
items.description: Scientific Machine Learning framework simulating AdS/CFT duality using Fourier Neural Operators.

items.name: Cancer-Proteome-Hierarchical-Classifier
items.description: A hierarchical machine learning framework using Random Forest to classify cancer cell line lineage and subtype from pan-cancer proteomic maps. Demonstrates high-dimensional data preprocessing, EDA (PCA/t-SNE/UMAP), and biomarker identification.

items.name: Machine-Learning
items.description: Projects in this repository demonstrate the full machine learning workflow, including data preprocessing, model design, mathematical formulation of models, training, evaluation, and analysis, with implementations written from scratch or using standard ML frameworks.

items.name: gymnasium
items.description: A simple and straightforward machine learning framework

items.name: Churn-Analysis-Project-in-Telecom-Industry
items.description: In competitive industries like telecoms, retaining customers is as vital as gaining them. Using real-world data, this churn research project analyzes why users leave and how to stop it. By leveraging machine learning and predictive modeling, I translate data into business strategies, creating a framework to maintain an engaged, loyal customer base.

items.name: Stock-Prediction-Project
items.description: A Python-based machine learning framework that predicts Tesla's daily stock returns by combining FinBERT transformer sentiment analysis of Elon Musk's tweets with traditional OHLCV technical indicators. The sentiment-enhanced model achieved a statistically significant R² improvement of 0.5% over the baseline, validated through bootstrap resampling.

items.name: disease-prdictor
items.description: This application bridges the gap between complex machine learning and accessible health technology. It leverages state-of-the-art predictive modeling and explainability frameworks to provide transparent diagnostic insights.  The Predictive Engine: XGBoost At the core of this tool is an eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) classifier.

items.name: sesethunkqenkqa.github.io
items.description: 🔍 Audit AI models for fairness and explainability with VeritasAI, the ethical framework for responsible machine learning training and evaluation.

items.name: AltCredAI
items.description: AltCredAI is an AI-powered alternate credit scoring framework designed to expand lending access to unbanked individuals and MSMEs.This project uses machine learning models to estimate Probability of Default (PD) from alternative financial signals and converts PD into an interpretable credit score with fairness auditing and explainability.

items.name: ml-framework-mlops25
items.description: This repository is for school assignments within the Machine Learning Framework area.

items.description: Network-Centrality–Driven Machine Learning Framework for Subtype-Aware Drug Efficacy Prediction in Breast Cancer

items.description: Hybrid AI model combining Deep and Machine Learning to detect Skin Cancer from Image dataset

items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: Machine-learning-project
items.description: This repository contains a collection of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, and LLM-based projects built using Python and modern ML frameworks. The projects demonstrate practical implementation of supervised learning, deep learning architectures, transformer models, and LLM workflows.

items.description: "This project investigates how study behavior patterns and cognitive load indicators influence academic performance and proposes a machine learning-based framework to generate intelligent, personalized learning recommendations."

items.description: A Python library for benchmarking the performance of machine learning models across different frameworks.
